description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and defines a single stage called build. Add a job named build in the build stage that runs the following script commands: docker login -u $DOCKER_USER -p $DOCKER_PASS registry.gitlab.com, docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/brus46/mediawiki:latest ., and docker push registry.gitlab.com/brus46/mediawiki:latest. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are needed.
